title: También de dolor se canta
writer: René Cardona, Álvaro Custodio, Pedro de Urdimalas
actors: Pedro Infante, Guillermina Grin, Óscar Pulido
plot: Braulio Peláez, a primary school teacher, causes an accident to Alfonso Madrazo, a famous actor. When his sister Luisa recognizes Alfonso, she asks him to help her become a star, but the one who ends up starring in a movie is Brau...
